tasks.title: Modify config.ts
tasks.description: Modify src/utils/config.ts. Add `workspaces` to `GwrkConfigSchema` and validation logic. Tests: src/utils/config.test.ts

tasks.title: Modify profile-detector.ts
tasks.description: Modify src/engine/profile-detector.ts. Add workspace resolution — `cwd` matching against workspace keys. Extends existing root-level detection from R007.. Tests: src/engine/profile-detector.test.ts

tasks.title: Modify cli.ts
tasks.description: Modify src/cli.ts. Add global `--workspace <name>` flag parsing and propagation. Tests: src/cli.test.ts

tasks.title: Modify init.ts
tasks.description: Modify src/commands/init.ts. Detect existing project root and append workspace instead of new root config. Tests: src/commands/init.test.ts
